meaning: n.轻便双轮马车 Tonga 汤加
examples: Within the span of several centuries, the Lapita stretched the boundaries of their world from the jungle — clad volcanoes of Papua New Guinea to the loneliest coral outliers of Tonga.
Tonga is moving in the opposite direction.
Another seven people were killed in Tonga, several hundred kilometres farther south.
Two Reihana penalties and a Soane Tonga'uiha try put Northampton further ahead before the Chiefs rallied.
Tonga took a 12-10 lead into the break, but the drama came in the second half.
